scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); try { fs.unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); } catch (e) {} try { fs.unlinkSync('yarn.lock'); } catch (e) {} if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.startsWith('pnpm/')) { if (process.env.npm_config_user_agent) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); } }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
